image_description: A diagram showing multiple processes sharing a single CPU over time.
learning_objective: Understand the basic concept of multiplexing in operating systems.

image_description: A flowchart illustrating the steps involved in a context switch between two processes.
learning_objective: Explain the steps and purpose of a context switch in an operating system.

image_description: A diagram of a scheduler managing multiple runnable processes in a queue.
learning_objective: Describe the role of the scheduler in managing processes and ensuring fairness.

image_description: A timeline showing how hardware timer interrupts trigger context switches.
learning_objective: Analyze the relationship between hardware timer interrupts and context switches.

image_description: A circular diagram representing the round-robin scheduling policy with time slices.
learning_objective: Identify the key characteristics of the round-robin scheduling policy.
